sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85895" key="*poseidwnopeth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ποσειδωνοπετής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n85895.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coming from Poseidon,</tr_> formed <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διοπετής</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
